title: I Won't Let You Have It!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe! It's honey bread day! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's the last one! Lucky me! I'd better grab it
before—

Phew, thank goodness I made it before they sold
ou—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Teio, were you going for that honey bread
too?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: (Oh no. Knowing Spe, I bet she'll be like...)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I won't let you have it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I challenge you to a duel for this honey bread!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: (Or something like that...)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: How about we split it?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I accept your challenge! Okay, whoever wins gets
the bread!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
You two are racing?! I wanna run too! I'm gonna
run and win that bread!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ah... No, we're not racing or anything. I just
jumped to conclusions and—

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... Sounds like you're just chickening out
because you're afraid of losing!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I-I never said that! Quit putting words in my
mouth!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! A race for the honey bread sounds like a
great idea! Well, you'd better kiss that bread
goodbye because...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I won't let you have it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Grrr!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: That honey bread is mine!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Aww, I lost! But that was really fun! It kind of felt
like a field day for a second there!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze! Huff... puff... I'm... so tired...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... Same. I'm hungrier than before, too.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... Let's all share the bread, then! That was
the original plan anyway.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Plus, honey bread tastes best after exercising! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the three of them split the honey bread
equally among themselves.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I won fair and square, Teio, so the bread's all
mine!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Urrrgh! I can't believe I lost!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! I'm going to go train! I won't lose to you
next time!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze! Huff... puff... Wh-what's that? Y-you wanna... go another lap?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Come at me... Wheeze! I'll take you on... any day!
